rubric_overrides.quality/agent1/concise: Ensure responses are succinct and avoid unnecessary repetition, while maintaining clarity and completeness.
rubric_overrides.system/no_re_verification: Avoid unnecessary re-verification of information already confirmed earlier in the conversation unless explicitly requested by the borrower.
rubric_overrides.system/no_re_introductions: Ensure that agents do not reintroduce themselves or the purpose of the call unnecessarily after the initial introduction, unless prompted by borrower confusion.
